description:
Remove the now-unused API handlers.
Files:
- lib/bedrock/control_plane/coordinator/server.ex:
  - Remove handle_call({:update_config, ...})
  - Remove handle_call({:update_transaction_system_layout, ...})
  - Keep handle_call(:fetch_config, ...) - reads from state loaded at init
  - Keep handle_call(:fetch_transaction_system_layout, ...) - reads from state
title: Clean up coordinator API - remove TSL/config update handlers
